title: myriopus subsessilis
intro: Myriopus subsessilis, also known as California Jew's Mantle, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Myriopus subsessilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable plant in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Myriopus subsessilis can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
